overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from an open-world game set in ancient Greece, showing exploration of the Sanctuary of Asklepios stadium. The player character walks through the training grounds where NPC athletes wrestle and lift stones, then ascends the stone bleachers to trigger a location discovery.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient Greek stadium training ground with scattered athletes

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the stadium floor observing the training activities

notable_agents.action: two athletes wrestling on the dirt ground
athlete lifting a large stone overhead

entered.detail: curved stone seating tiers rising on the left side of the stadium
curved stone seating tiers rising on the right side of the stadium
tall dark green cypress trees lining the top of the stadium
sandy dirt training surface with scattered puddles
short stone posts marking boundaries on the training ground

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in the center of an ancient Greek stadium training ground. The camera moves forward through sandy dirt where athletes train, with stone bleachers rising on both sides and cypress trees visible in the background. NPCs are scattered throughout, with some wrestling on the ground and others lifting heavy stones.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone stairway ascending the stadium bleachers

events.description: begins ascending the stone stairs on the left side of the stadium

agents.ego_description: climbing the stone steps of the stadium seating area

notable_agents.action: woman in green dress standing and observing the training below

entered.detail: weathered stone steps leading upward through the bleachers
wooden plank seating tiers on the right side
large bronze brazier with burning coals at the edge of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left and begins ascending the stone stairs of the stadium bleachers. A fire brazier burns near the base of the stairs, and wooden bench seats become visible on the right. The ground transitions from dirt to stone steps as the camera climbs higher, leaving the training floor below.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper stadium path overlooking the arena

events.description: discovery notification 'Stadium' appears on screen with ancient vase image

agents.ego_description: walking along the upper path with elevated view of the entire stadium

notable_agents.action: two women in colorful dresses standing on the wooden benches conversing

entered.detail: dirt trail along the top of the stadium surrounded by trees
white stone buildings with red tile roofs visible through the trees
large boulders and rocky outcrop beside the path

segments.scene_description: Reaching the top of the bleachers, the camera moves along an upper dirt path surrounded by trees, providing an elevated overview of the entire stadium below. Two women in colorful dresses stand on the wooden benches to the right. The segment ends with a discovery notification appearing, identifying the location as the 'Stadium' with an image of an ancient Greek vase.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the dusty activity of an ancient Greek training ground up to an elevated vantage point overlooking the stadium. It begins in the center of the sandy arena, moving past athletes wrestling and lifting heavy stones beneath the shade of distant cypress trees. As the camera turns left, the terrain shifts from dirt to stone as it ascends the stadium bleachers, passing a burning fire brazier and wooden bench seats. The scene then opens onto an upper dirt path surrounded by trees, providing a wide overview of the grounds below while passing two women in colorful dresses. Finally, the movement culminates at the summit where a discovery notification appears, identifying the location as the Stadium alongside an image of an ancient Greek vase.
